headline: What Makes CMS Energy Corp. (CMS) an Attractive Investment?
summary: Parnassus Investments, an investment management company, released the “Parnassus Mid Cap Fund” fourth-quarter 2025 investor letter. A copy of the letter is available to download here. The Q4 2025 marked the fund’s consecutive quarter of outperformance, returning 1.17% (net of fees) in the quarter, surpassing 0.16% return for the Russell Midcap Index. The performance was […]
